issues_found_and_fixed.detail: Raw daily dates formatted as '01/01/24 Mon' — stripped weekday suffix, parsed with format %m/%d/%y

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Call volume stored as string with commas
Service level and abandon rate stored as percentage strings
issues_found_and_fixed.detail: '98.55%' → stripped % sign, divided by 100 to get decimal [0,1]

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Phase 2 standardization destroyed month and interval columns
issues_found_and_fixed.detail: numeric_columns_by_type incorrectly included 'month' and 'interval'. pd.to_numeric('April') → NaN, pd.to_numeric('00:30:00') → NaN. Fixed by reloading from raw files for interval reconstruction.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Excel merged cells in month column
issues_found_and_fixed.detail: Month value only present on first row of each block in Excel. CSV export left remaining rows blank. Fixed with ffill() before any parsing.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Interval column format HH:MM:SS not numeric
issues_found_and_fixed.detail: Parsed as hour*2 + minute//30 to create slot_index 0-47. Cross-join built on slot_index not on raw string.
Portfolio A had 86 of 91 days with fewer than 48 slots. Built complete 48-slot grid via cross-join, missing slots filled by imputation.

issues_found_and_fixed.issue: Abandoned rate stored as percentage string
issues_found_and_fixed.detail: '0.37%' format — could not be parsed numerically. Recalculated directly from abandoned_calls / call_volume after imputation.
Slots with call_volume <= 2 and CCT > 1800s are small-sample artifacts. Replaced with slot-level overnight median.
August 2025 actuals present in daily data. Enforced hard train cutoff at 2025-07-31 using is_train_period flag. Imputation only applied to train rows.

imputation_strategy.daily: Group-based median — Pass 1: (weekday + month) group median. Pass 2: weekday-only median. Pass 3: global median safety net. Train set only.
imputation_strategy.interval: Group-based median — Pass 1: (slot_index, is_weekend) median. Pass 2: slot_index-only median. Pass 3: global median safety net.

validation_result.status: PASSED — data is clean and ready for modeling

decisions_made: August 2025 daily actuals present in raw data — treated as strict holdout, never touched during training or imputation
Portfolio D missing Aug 27-31 in daily data — kept as NaN in holdout zone, model must extrapolate
Daytime CCT outliers flagged but NOT removed — asymmetric scoring means real peaks must be preserved
Overnight CCT extremes smoothed — confirmed as small-sample noise not real operational signal
Abandoned rate recalculated from source columns rather than imputed — enforces internal consistency
